user_query: The wrangler.toml sets compatibility_date to an old value (2023-01-01) and is missing compatibility_flags = ["nodejs_compat"]. Our worker uses Node.js-compatible APIs (Buffer, crypto) that require the nodejs_compat flag to work in Cloudflare Workers. Update wrangler.toml to set compatibility_date to 2024-09-23 and add the nodejs_compat flag.
